name: OpenClawing2 — Phase 1 References
description: Regression suite covering OSS submodule vendoring, licence inventory, and the sync script.

metadata._llm_driven_reason: Vision-driven test suite per HelixQA Constitution §1 (Fully Autonomous LLM-Driven QA): prose actions are interpreted by the vision model. Article XI §11.5 exemption.
metadata.author: vasic-digital

test_cases.name: Every vendored OSS submodule is documented + has a licence

steps.name: Run pkg/opensource.Audit against tools/opensource
steps.expected: Every submodule name appears in both docs/opensource-references.md and docs/licences-inventory.md

steps.name: Run licence-file locator for the OpenClawing2 set
steps.expected: browser-use / skyvern / stagehand / ui-tars / ui-tars-desktop / anthropic-quickstarts all ship LICENSE files

test_cases.expected_result: Audit gate clean — no undocumented submodule, no missing licence

test_cases.name: Skyvern's AGPL status is enforced at the grep gate

steps.name: Grep HelixQA Go sources for Skyvern identifiers
steps.expected: zero matches — Skyvern code is quarantined to tools/opensource/skyvern/ only

steps.name: Grep for Skyvern imports
steps.expected: zero matches — Go module system must never pull Skyvern code into the build graph

test_cases.expected_result: AGPL code remains reference-only; HelixQA's Apache-2.0 posture preserved

test_cases.name: Sync script reports pinned-vs-remote diff without mutating state

steps.name: Run scripts/sync-opensource-references.sh (default diff mode)
steps.expected: Emits a table with SUBMODULE / PINNED_SHA / REMOTE_HEAD / STATE columns without checking out anything

steps.name: Verify --fetch-only honours the safety contract
steps.expected: Fetches but never checks out; exit code 0

test_cases.expected_result: Operators can dry-run the sync safely before committing a SHA bump

test_cases.name: Pinned SHAs in opensource-references.md match the on-disk submodule state

steps.name: For each OpenClawing2 submodule, compare git rev-parse HEAD to the Pinned SHA column
steps.action: for m in browser-use skyvern stagehand ui-tars ui-tars-desktop anthropic-quickstarts; do (cd tools/opensource/$m && git rev-parse HEAD); done
steps.expected: Each SHA equals the value documented in docs/opensource-references.md

test_cases.expected_result: Doc + code stay in lockstep; SHA drift is caught at PR time
